summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Ghiras Club Student Points Management app completed successfully. All main features working: Auth, Dashboard Protection, Points Modal, Public Student Pages

minor.note: This is infrastructure-level, not app bug

seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_ prefixed students and challenges during pytest (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App fully functional. Auth with admin/ghiras2024, JWT token stored in localStorage (ghiras_token, ghiras_token_expiry). Points modal opens on 'تعديل النقاط' button click. Public pages at /public/:studentId work without auth.

frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Dashboard displays students grouped by supervisor
✓ Points modal opens on button click
✓ Positive points tab shows options (حضور, مشروع طالب, إلقاء كلمة, etc)
✓ Negative points tab shows options (تأخير, غياب, التلفظ, etc)
✓ Custom points form visible in custom tab
✓ Public student page (/public/:id) works without login
